evaluators.name: Favorite Three Newest Short English Commercial Demos Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the user searched for English commercial voiceover demos under 30 seconds sorted by most recent and favorited the three newest qualifying demos.

evaluators.name: Longer English Character Video-Game Demo Shortlist Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the user filtered for English character video game/animation demos, compared the first two newest results, and shortlisted the one with the longer duration.

evaluators.name: Two Most Recent Qualifying Drama Showreels Casting Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the user filtered for drama showreels filmed in or after 2019 with duration at least 60 seconds, sorted by most recent, and added the two newest qualifying reels to the casting list.

evaluators.name: 60-Second Online Ad Quote Within Budget Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the user requested a quote for an ~60 second online ad / web commercial with online worldwide territory and submitted a quote inquiry whose calculator estimate is at or under $600.

evaluators.name: Directed 2-Hour Remote Session Mid-April Morning Booking Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the user submitted a booking request for a 2-hour directed remote recording session in mid-April 2026 at 10:00 AM America/New_York with two distinct preferred connection methods.

evaluators.name: Favorite Three Recent Ad-Agency Clients and Sort Alphabetically Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the user filtered testimonials to advertising/marketing agencies from 2022 onward, favorited clients corresponding to the three most recent unique such testimonials, and viewed favorites sorted alphabetically by company name.

evaluators.name: Combined VO + On-Camera Plan Within 3 Hours and Budget Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the user saved a project plan that combines a commercial voiceover service and an on-camera self-tape service, keeps total time at or under 3 hours, sets a budget under $1,000, and notes that commercial voiceover should be prioritized.

evaluators.name: Casting-Focused Monthly Newsletter Subscription Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the user subscribed with a casting-related example.com email, selected commercial voiceover, animation, and drama acting interests, chose monthly summary only, disabled weekly tips, and enabled casting availability updates.
